statement: The operator reviewed and explicitly authorized merging the exact substantive Lab PR #110 content at commit e2e74eb6a16421a784e3143c279603f430208cbe. That content establishes a structured, read-only, adversarially tested promotion gate for proposals from Experimental-Sandbox into Lab. This authorization permits only merge-authorization bookkeeping after the authorized content commit.
non_claims: This authorization covers only the exact substantive content commit e2e74eb6a16421a784e3143c279603f430208cbe; any later substantive change requires new operator authorization.
This does not certify the PR content is correct, safe, secure, private, or complete.
This does not authorize any change outside operations/merge_authorizations/ after the authorized substantive commit.
This does not authorize any other pull request, branch, repository, setting, deletion, promotion, dependency change, or Hermes action.
